headline: How The Keysight Technologies (KEYS) Story Is Evolving With New Growth Drivers And Valuation Views
summary: Keysight Technologies is now being valued slightly higher in fresh research, with one updated fair value estimate moving from US$298.62 to US$301.54. That modest shift comes as analysts react to fiscal Q1 results, highlighting stronger orders, broader demand beyond AI, and raised long term earnings frameworks, while still debating how much optimism is already reflected in current targets. As you read on, you will see how these differing views are shaping the evolving narrative around Keysight...

headline: Bank of America Names 2 Top Neocloud Stocks to Buy in 2026
summary: Talk about cloud computing, and most conversations quickly circle back to the usual giants – the hyperscalers. Names like Amazon, Microsoft, and Alphabet tend to dominate the narrative, and for good reason. Their scale, infrastructure, and reach have long defined what the cloud looks like. But the hyperscalers are hardly the only game in town. The neoclouds, the array of smaller, specialist companies that provide cloud services at smaller scales, are building a growing niche. Neocloud companies

headline: Microsoft Set for Worst Quarter Since 2008 as AI Takes Two Bites
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Microsoft Corp. is at the intersection of two troubling trends roiling the technology sector, which has the stock on track for its worst quarterly performance since the global financial crisis two decades ago.First, the software giant is doubling down on capital expenditures as Wall Street increasingly asks when investments in artificial intelligence infrastructure will produce more dramatic payoffs in revenue growth.
